## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to add or improve.

## Type

- [ ] New category
- [ ] New section
- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Other

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should be implemented.

## Resources

If suggesting a new category, please provide at least 3 resources that would fit:

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
